async monitorNewsAndSentiment(companyName: string) {
const articles = await this.newsAPI.search({ q: companyName, from: '7daysAgo' });
const sentiment = await this.sentimentAnalyzer.analyze(articles);
return { sentiment, signals: this.extractGrowthSignals(articles) };
}
}
